Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property (144 Andover Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Jul-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Jewish Family & Children's Services.

The sale was confirmed at $1,275,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed June 17, 2019. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
